title: Free Slice with Any Large Order
description: Order any large pizza and get a free slice on us. Valid any day, dine-in or takeout. Show your SNAP member QR at the counter.

title: 20% Off Any Bouquet Over $30
description: Fresh seasonal arrangements, hand-picked Nova Scotia flowers. Perfect for gifts or brightening up your week. Show QR in store.

title: First Month Half Price on Any Unit
description: Moving, downsizing, or just need space? Get your first month at half the regular rate on any available unit. Dartmouth location.

title: $5 Off Any Weekday Cut
description: Skip the weekend rush. Book Monday to Friday and save $5 on any haircut or fade. Walk-ins welcome, appointment preferred.

title: Free Size Upgrade Before 10am
description: Early bird special. Any drink ordered before 10am gets a free size upgrade. Medium becomes large, large becomes extra large.
